pr.title: Build BLOBBIE Daily Draw platform
pr.body: ## Summary - Add Solidity Daily Draw contract with dynamic BLOBBIE ticket pricing, expiry top-up rules, Chainlink VRF fulfillment, auditable ticket ranges, and jackpot reserve payouts. - Add BLOBBIE/USD oracle using a PancakeSwap-style BLOBBIE/WBNB pair plus Chainlink BNB/USD. - Add Prisma-backed API, shared database client, and worker scaffolds for public audit data, admin operations, event indexing, threshold close, expiry top-up, and round opening. - Add Foundry contracts package with DailyDraw, JackpotVault, PriceAdapter, TreasuryRouter, deployment scripts, verification scripts, and comprehensive tests. - Add NestJS backend modules, Prisma schema/migration, contract indexer, BullMQ automation, admin APIs, and public verification endpoints. - Build complete responsive Next.js frontend with BLOBBIE styling, wallet connection, contract hooks, pages, admin UI, and verification views. - Add Docker Compose, service Dockerfiles, pnpm workspace setup, README deployment runbook, and free-tier hosting templates. - Add Vercel web config, Render blueprint, BSC testnet env examples, and `docs/free-hosting.md` for Neon/Supabase/Upstash/Vercel/Render style deployments. ## Verification - `corepack pnpm typecheck` - `corepack pnpm --filter @blobby/web build` - `corepack pnpm --filter @blobby/api build` - `corepack pnpm --filter @blobby/worker build` - `corepack pnpm --filter @blobby/realtime build` - Prior full audit verification also passed: `corepack pnpm lint`, `corepack pnpm build`, `corepack pnpm test`, `forge fmt --check`, `forge build`, `forge test -vvv` (42 passed, 0 failed). ## Notes - I cannot deploy to Vercel/Render/Neon/Upstash without your account credentials and project ownership. The repo is prepared for deployment from your own free-tier accounts. - Docker CLI is not installed in this cloud environment, so `docker compose config` / `docker compose up -d` could not be executed here. - No real secrets or private keys were added.
pr.author: shralireza42
